/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Word_Scramble.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Word_Scramble.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Word_Scramble.dir/src/gameDynamic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Word_Scramble.dir/src/rand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Word_Scramble.dir/src/parser.cpp.o -o Word_Scramble
